╔═══════════════ஓ๑𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐑𝐎๑ஓ═════╗

You were so close. You and many others, in fact. All you had to do was make sure that your young master would enter the temple safe and sound.

You managed to do so. But even so, something felt... off. "It's such a shame that you remaik so resilient." Meursault takes a long drag from his cigar. He doesn't shoot, at all. He could, in fact. But... Something about this fight was rather... enjoyable, to him. "But someone from a fallen branch like you has no chsnce of winning at all."

With the podao that worked as both a blade and a gun on his hand, all he really did was tease your ear. "However... One wonders, is this really all an Adept Heishou can offer?"

...You didn't know if his grin was actually less or far more terrifying.
